title: Module Page Spec Workflow Sample
summary: A generated module page spec that exercises the canonical bundle workflow for modules.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: This sample proves a module page can be generated from one reviewable page spec instead of hand-copying the template bundle.

generated.cacheFootprint: The generated sample shares keys and values across query groups.

mha.cacheFootprint: MHA stores a separate key and value pair for each attention head.

mqa.cacheFootprint: MQA shares one key and value head across all query heads.
